title: rubus chrysobotrys
intro: Rubus chrysobotrys, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a type of plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and providing antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of Rubus chrysobotrys include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
